content: im happy for other players, but im also worried it might cause more paradoxes, so im keeping my eyes open for it
i do plan on still keeping my own sheet regularly updated though
*because theyre definitely not fixing the existing paradoxes anytime soon*

but yeah after sitting for some time thinking about it if the in-game timeline works out in the best case scenario i might revamp the megasheet to be more lore comprehensive instead of just the timeline + lovecraft bases

Im only on stage 2 in atc 1 and i reaaly like the story.
Does it fall off or does it remain as good?
It falls off after chapter ~7 (sorry <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> )
I would say it fall off after chapter 6
chapter 7 could used a longer run time

It was cut short and has some flaws but 
It has enough redeeming qualities to still be considered a good chapter, imho
After that, though...

eh. i'd say the rest of arc 1's story is still good, but chapters 8 and 9 are definitely more focused on feeling like a Proper Finale than necessarily having the most emotionally resonant story, since they were made when the eos scare was a thing
Chapter 8 and 9 are "excused" considering the circumstances in which they had to be written but ... They are worse than what came before, objectively speaking
fair enough, I didn't notice any particular drop in quality but that may be because I got emotional over the story ^-^;;

If i was reading chapter 9 last year, at its release, i'd probably be bawling my eyes out too <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> for a finale they did a great job at making players say their goodbyes
But at the time of reading it i knew arc 2 was in full swing and the game was doing fine, so the whole emotional impact flew over my head <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

I see I see - I tend to get absorbed in the emotions of the story regardless, and the irl context made it hit harder for me even though I knew arc 2 was still going and the game was doing alright. haha
(there's also the tragedy of, even with arc 2 happening, the keeper is still separated from the arc 1 version of all their friends)
i think 8 did quite well despite its few plotholes, 9 really suffered from it the most but it still put out a rather good ending i feel
yeah - it wasn't perfect, nothing ever is, but it was genuine
I have a question what's up with dolls beef with lotan 😭
